hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, subprocess, re
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
cmd = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('command', '')
if not re.search(r'git\s+commit', cmd):
    sys.exit(0)
result = subprocess.run(['git', 'diff', '--cached', '--name-only'], capture_output=True, text=True)
binaries = [f for f in result.stdout.splitlines() if re.search(r'\.(exe|o|out|obj|bin|dll|so|dylib|a|class|pyc)$', f)]
if binaries:
    print('ERROR: Binary/compiled files staged for commit:', file=sys.stderr)
    for f in binaries:
        print(' ', f, file=sys.stderr)
    sys.exit(2)
"
